description_long: This is a two-story detached house with a hip roof and a prominent front-facing gable. The structure features a combination of rectangular and square windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with a covered front porch supported by columns. The property includes a detached garage to the left, a fenced yard with landscaped greenery, and a circular above-ground pool in the backyard. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a dark material, contrasting with the lighter trim and window frames. The house sits within a low boundary wall, and the main entryway is accentuated by a small set of steps and a covered portico.
description: A two-story hip-roofed house with a front porch, detached garage, fenced yard, and backyard pool, featuring symmetrical windows and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, detached garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, circular pool, and rear entrance with visible landscaping.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, glass-enclosed sunroom, and more of the fenced yard and greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the back of the house, garage, and open paved area.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, steps, and a prominent main door
